ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-28-2020 Continued To Aug-25-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that this is the twelfth time this matter is on calendar. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on August 25, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear to address the petition, why they have failed to respond to the Probate Examiner's notes, and to show cause as to why the Executor should not be suspended and why the Public Guardian should not be appointed as the Administer of the estate. The order to appear will also ask the Public Administrator to appear on that date. The First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2020 Continued To Aug-05-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-14-2020 Continued To Feb-04-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-17-2019 Continued To Jan-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Russell Longaway for Petitioner.

Mr. Longaway stated that he e-filed his document again and that it got rejected again. The Court explained to Mr. Longaway that the reason it was rejected is because he filed an amended petition for probate and that the current petition before the Court is the first and final account and report. The First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is continued to January 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Longaway is to file the correct document by January 7, 2020.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2019 Continued To Dec-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Russell Longaway for Petitioner.

The Court stated that it is still looking for a filed response to the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Longaway stated that he tried to file his document three times, twice by e-file and once in person, that his filings have been rejected and that he does not know what to do. The Court Clerk read the list of reasons as to why his document was rejected. The Court instructed Mr. Longaway to look at the rejection reasons and to make the appropriate corrections to his document. The First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is continued to December 17, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-22-2019 Continued To Nov-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Russell Longaway for Petitioner.

The Court noted that there was a hearing on October 1st at which time the Probate Examiner's notes indicated that a supplement or an amendment petition needed to be filed. Mr. Longaway stated that he e-filed an amended petition on October 15th. The Court Clerk explained that only a proposed order was lodged on October 18th and that there is no showing of an amended petition. The First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is continued to November 19, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of an amended petition.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-01-2019 Continued To Oct-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Russell Longaway for petitioner.

The Court inquired about filed responses to Examiner's notes. Mr. Longaway stated he e-filed it but was never filed. The Court explained the un-endorsed courtesy copy he received titled "order for final distribution," was lodged, not filed, by the clerk's office because of the title, therefore it still needs filed responses to the examiner's notes, either a supplemental or amended petition, and a proposed order.

The First and Final Account and Report of Executor, Petition for Allowance of Fees and Final Distribution is continued to October 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204, documents to be filed by October 15, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-03-2019 Continued To Oct-01-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Continued To Sep-03-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Russell Benedict Longaway for Gratteri Leonardo.

The First and Final Account and Report of Executor, Petition For Allowance Of Fees and Final Distribution is continued to September 3, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court directed counsel to immediately obtain and address the probate examiner's notes and respond by August 27, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: B. Wan. Not reported.

The First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is also continued to that date.
